name: Frill Holding AB (publ)
summary: Frill Holding AB (publ) operates as a functional foods company in Sweden, the United Kingdom, and the United States. The company manufactures, markets, and sells food products, as well as produces foods in the form of bars and sweets. Its products include Frill, a healthy snacks made from fruits, berries, and vegetables; and Add Ice Cream, a healthy ice cream that delivers functional benefits, such as proteins and vitamins. The company also offers olive oil, pasta, truffles, and chocolates under the Bacoccoli brand; and healthy and functional products based on honey, dietary fiber, algae, and oats under the Bezzt of Nature brand. Frill Holding AB (publ) was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden.
